title: Fix SSE Manager: store intervals, add shutdown, reduce log level
description: src/sse/index.ts:79-111, 397-407: (1) setInterval handles never stored or cleared on shutdown — prevents process exit; (2) 'Attempting to send data to client' and 'Broadcasting state change' logs at INFO level per client per change — floods logs; (3) send() may write to closed res. Fix: store interval handles, add shutdown() method, change ping/state logs to debug level, add writableEnded check before send().
validation: Read file, confirm interval handles stored in instance, shutdown() method clears them, log level is debug. Run SSE test.
